description:
Operating Area: Croatia

Lotus was built in 2006 by Huzur Yat - one of the finest Turkish shipyards when it comes to luxury yachts building. This boutique motor sailer was built for a private owner, a passionate wealthy sailor who decided to sell it in 2018, as he could not find enough time in his busy schedule to enjoy it. During 12 years of his ownership, the main engine of the yacht had less than 300 working hours.

In August 2018, the yacht was purchased by a Croatian owner to be introduced as a new entry to the luxury yacht charter market in Croatia for the season 2019.

Lotus is the epitome of traditional elegance. Her sleek and eye-catching looks make a statement at every port or shore. Equipped with the serious sailing equipment which ensures proper sailing experience onboard, she simultaneously demonstrates high performance and comfort.

Lotus comprises a stylish interior that includes four spacious cabins: master, two doubles, and one twin. The salon is spacious and airy, surrounded by big windows. This sense of openness continues on deck with the indoors and outdoors blending seamlessly into each other and plenty of space for alfresco dining as well as endless opportunities for both relaxation and entertainment as she is well supplied with water sports equipment.

If you are looking for a charter to bring a sense of Zen-like calm back into your life, Lotus could well be it.

crew.name: ROKO LELAS
crew.bio:
Roko is an experienced captain he has years of continuous work in the charter industry.

Since 2004, when his family purchased their first charter vessel, a mini-cruiser - Roko has spent every summer working on it, at the beginning as a sailor, and later as a captain. His background in kinesiology adds structure to his leadership and onboard organisation.

Throughout his career, Roko has managed annual charter seasons on the Adriatic, developing strong navigation skills, itinerary planning, and a precise understanding of guest preferences. He is fully familiar with the region’s anchorages, protected 
bays, and coastal ports, ensuring smooth cruising and efficient decision-making in all conditions.

On board, Roko focuses on safety, clear communication, and well-coordinated deck operations. In his free time, he stays active through sports.

crew.name: PETROMIR LELAS
crew.bio:
With over 30 years of experience at sea, Petromir combines his expertise as both a seasoned sailor and a talented chef.

He began his maritime journey in 2004, buying his first boat and serving as both captain and chef, and for the past 25 years he has successfully managed his own vessels.

A graduate of the Tourism and Hospitality School in Split, he specializes in Mediterranean and traditional Dalmatian cuisine, delighting guests with fresh, local flavors and unforgettable meals. Petromir is reliable, experienced, and a true team player, always ensuring that every guest leaves satisfied. His dedication to excellent customer servicemakes him an invaluable part of our crew

crew.name: DANIJELA BILONIC
crew.bio:
Danijela is an experienced stewardess with a strong background in hospitality, tourism, and guest-facing services.

She is a certified tourist guide and event manager, bringing organised workflow, structured service standards, and strong communication skills to the interior department. Danijela is fluent in German and English, with a solid understanding of Italian, which ensures efficient interaction with international charter groups.

She has worked in service and housekeeping roles aboard motor yachts, including M/Y Azzurro and M/Y Solaris, gaining practical experience in table service, cabin maintenance, guest assistance, and daily interior operations. Her training in tourism has strengthened her ability to anticipate needs, manage guest schedules, and support a smooth charter flow.

On board, Danijela focuses on precise service, efficient coordination with the galley and deck teams, and maintaining a consistently high standard across all interior areas. Her attention to detail and professional approach contribute directly to a comfortable and well-organised guest experience.

crew.name: GEORGIJ GRUBAR
crew.bio:
Georgij is a capable and motivated deckhand with hands-on maritime experience.

Georgij has a background in inland navigation. Despite his family not having a maritime legacy, his father’s career in river navigation inspired his path. He completed his studies at the Secondary School for Inland Navigation and gained hands-on experience as a deckhand on a motor sailer. He has experience as the deckhand at Almissa d.o.o., Omiš, with strong seamanship skills and proven experience in vessel maintenance and daily onboard operations. His dedication to service and exploration on the open waters aligns well with the rest of the crew.

pricingInfo.name: SHOULDER SEASON: May 30 – June 13 / August 29 - September 19
LOW SEASON: Until June 14 / from September 1
